meaning: n.透明,透明度,幻灯片,有图案的玻璃
examples: Cataracts affect the transparency of the eye's lenses.
If consumers say they want transparency, tell them exactly what is in your product.
It's past time for transparency with these institutions, and it's past time to eliminate zoos from our culture.
There are wannabe Soroses managing mega hedge funds, without the transparency required of Berkshire Hathaway.
An optical laser reads the transparency and creates a wobbly, out-of-tune, almost eerie-sounding keyboard effect.
